hero.title: The Enterprise OS
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one platform for operators, enterprises, supervisors, drivers, and passengers

hero.title: Smart Mobility, Practical Results
hero.subtitle: Tranzkit turns complex transport into dependable, efficient movement. Our AI-powered platform connects operators, drivers, enterprises, and passengers so every trip runs smoother, cheaper, and safer.

intro.text: One platform for operations, drivers, companies, and riders. Use Tranzkit to reduce costs, improve on-time performance, and get clear insights into every trip.

howWeHelp.title: How We Help
benefits: Reliable route planning and real-time tracking
Automated billing and transparent cost control
Passenger safety, verification, and feedback tools

operators.title: For Operators & Drivers
operators.headline: Manage fleets with precision. Run better days.
operators.description: Operators gain intelligent routing, live monitoring, and automated workflows. Drivers get a simple app for assignments, earnings tracking, and fast communication.

enterprises.title: For Enterprises & Passengers
enterprises.headline: Control costs and keep people moving.
enterprises.description: Enterprises get centralized control of employee transport, clear invoices, and analytics. Passengers enjoy punctual, secure, and trackable rides.
benefits: Real-time ride visibility and passenger notifications

whyTranzkit.title: Why Tranzkit
reasons: Full transparency from booking to billing

hero.title: Tools for Operators. Ease for Drivers.
hero.subtitle: Tranzkit streamlines every aspect of fleet and driver management. Real-time insights, intelligent routing, and simple apps empower operators and drivers to perform at their best.

overview.text: Operators and drivers face daily challenges: tight schedules, unpredictable traffic, and complex fleet coordination. Tranzkit solves these with AI-powered planning, live monitoring, and automated workflows so you can focus on delivering safe, efficient, and profitable transport.

items.title: Smart Fleet Management
items.description: Optimize your fleet operations with intelligent tools
points: Plan and optimize routes in real time
Reduce empty trips and waiting times
Track driver performance and fleet utilization

items.title: Automated Scheduling & Dispatch
points: Ensure smooth communication between operators and drivers

items.title: Real-Time Insights
items.description: Make data-driven decisions with live analytics
points: Live dashboards for trip and fleet monitoring
Alerts for delays, incidents, or non-compliance

items.title: Driver-Focused Tools
points: Simple mobile app for trip acceptance and navigation

aiAdvantage.title: AI Advantage
aiAdvantage.description: Tranzkit's AI predicts traffic, optimizes routes dynamically, and allocates trips based on driver availability and efficiency. This reduces operational costs, increases fleet utilization, and ensures passengers always get reliable service.

cta.title: Manage Your Fleet Smarter Today.
cta.subtitle: See how Tranzkit can transform your operations.

hero.title: Reliable Transport. Total Visibility.
hero.subtitle: Tranzkit gives enterprises control over employee mobility and offers passengers a seamless, stress-free travel experience.

overview.text: Companies need to transport employees safely, efficiently, and cost-effectively. Passengers want timely, safe rides without uncertainty. Tranzkit meets both needs in a single platform - delivering insights, automation, and real-time updates for everyone.

items.title: Centralized Management for Enterprises
points: One dashboard for all trips, suppliers, and budgets

items.title: Seamless Booking & Ride Experience for Passengers
points: Easy mobile booking and trip tracking

items.title: Analytics and Decision-Making Tools
points: Data-driven decisions for route and supplier optimization

items.title: Integration & Compliance
points: Connect with HR, payroll, or finance systems

aiAdvantage.title: AI Advantage
aiAdvantage.description: Tranzkit uses AI to forecast transport demand, allocate vehicles efficiently, and provide predictive analytics for cost optimization. Enterprises can see real-time performance metrics while passengers experience reliable and consistent service.
